references.passiveText: There's someone I wronged a long time ago. I keep meaning to make it right, but I never find the courage.
references.triggerDialogue: It was {target_npc}, back when we both lived near {location}. I won't bore you with the details, but I took something from them: not a thing you can hold, but trust. They moved on, settled somewhere {location_hint}, and I've been too much of a coward to follow. If you ever meet them, just... tell them I'm sorry. Or don't. Maybe some debts aren't meant to be paid with words.
